objective: Determine whether Stage 6 has satisfied its current acceptance gate and recommend exactly one allowlisted next action using only the supplied artifacts.

context_files.purpose: Authoritative research scope, stage definitions, and acceptance rules.
Completed Stage 1 through Stage 5 findings and current Stage 6 handoff.
Authoritative 18-combination Stage 6 replay matrix and tier assignments.

constraints: Do not call tools, execute commands, inspect any unsupplied file, modify files, or launch experiments.
Treat the plan, replay matrix, and deterministic verification artifacts as authoritative.
Do not alter the shortlist, sigma, tau, 200n budget, paired seeds, StepTolerance=1e-6, or 20-to-30-run rule.
Do not mark Stage 6 complete unless every required replay deliverable has been generated and audited.
A requested action is advisory only; execution is disabled and requires a later explicit Codex authorization.
required_checks: The strict equivalence gate must cover 9 shortlist problems x 2 noise levels x 5 runs x 2 algorithms = 180 solver-runs before formal replay is authorized.
Report the exact coverage currently established by the supplied equivalence artifact.
Confirm that the replay matrix contains 18 problem-feature combinations, including 13 Tier 1 and 5 Tier 2 combinations.
Distinguish implemented infrastructure from a completed formal replay dataset.
Recommend one action valid from EQUIVALENCE_GATE and cite supplied artifact evidence.
